title: corp-actions-reconciler output
description: Canonical output of the corp-actions-reconciler skill. Layer 1 (structured) consumed by UIs and downstream agents. Claude Code rendering described in references/rendering.md.

positions_checked.description: Total rows in the input position file

as_of.description: Timestamp at which the reconciliation was run

breaks.description: Position rows where the recorded share count or cost basis doesn't match the expected post-action state

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol (parent ticker for spinoffs)

kind.description: Type of corporate action that caused the break. spinoff = adjustment to the parent position; spinoff_new_position = the new subsidiary position created by the spin.

recorded_as_of.description: Date the input position was recorded as of

current_shares.description: Share count in the input file

expected_shares.description: Share count after applying all corporate actions

current_cost_basis.description: Per-share cost basis from the input file (null if input had no cost basis)

expected_cost_basis.description: Per-share cost basis adjusted for the action (null if input had no cost basis)

cash_in_lieu_expected.description: True when applying the action results in a fractional share that brokers typically pay out as cash-in-lieu

ex_date.description: Ex-date of the corporate action (Massive's execution_date for splits, ex_dividend_date for dividends)

ratio.description: For splits/reverse splits, e.g. '4-for-1' or '1-for-8'. For spinoffs, '{Y} shares per {X} share'.

amount.description: For dividends, cash amount per share

spinoff_ticker.description: For spinoffs, the ticker of the new subsidiary security

spin_ratio_y_per_x.description: For spinoffs, subsidiary shares received per parent share held

alloc_method.description: For spinoffs, how the cost-basis allocation was computed

parent_alloc_pct.description: For spinoffs, fraction of original basis retained by the parent position (0.0 to 1.0)

endpoint.description: Massive API endpoint that produced this corporate action record

passes.description: Position rows that reconciled cleanly. Empty by default in exception-report mode; populated when invoked with full=true

actions_applied.description: Count of corporate actions applied to reach the current share count

sources.description: All Massive endpoints called during reconciliation, for audit trail
